zh.Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Hughes II於1265年12月21日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾曼諾時，他的父親Sir Henry Hughes I19歲，母親Joan le Fleming21歲。他於1290年與Isabel Moores在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1330年2月在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Hughes II于1265年12月21日出生在英国英格兰越可爾曼諾时，他的父亲Sir Henry Hughes I19岁，母亲Joan le Fleming21岁。他于1290年与Isabel Moores在英国維爾爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1330年2月在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Hughes II was born on 21 December 1265, in Manor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Henry Hughes I, was 19 and his mother, Joan le Fleming, was 21. He married Isabel Moores in 1290, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in February 1330, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Hughes II est né le 21 décembre 1265, à Manor, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry Hughes I, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joan le Fleming, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Moores en 1290, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en février 1330, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Englan: Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Hughes II am 21. Dezember 1265 in Manor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Hughes I 19 und seine Mutter Joan le Fleming 21. Er hat 1290 in Wiltshire, England Isabel Moores geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb im Februar 1330 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Hughes IIが1265年12月21日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアマノーで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Hughes Iは19歳，母Joan le Flemingは21歳であった。1290年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでIsabel Mooresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1330年2月に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Hughes II(이)가 1265년 12월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Hughes I(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan le Fleming(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1290년 영국 윌츠히르에서 Isabel Moores(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1330년 2월 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Hughes II nasceu em 21 de dezembro de 1265, em Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry Hughes I, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Joan le Fleming, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Moores em 1290, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em fevereiro de 1330, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Hughes II родился 21 декабря 1265 г. в местности манор, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Hughes I было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan le Fleming, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Moores в 1290 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер февраль 1330 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.
